items.title: Automatic updates
items.text: BubblR Trainer now checks for updates on start and downloads a new version in the background automatically. When it's ready, click "Install & restart" and it swaps itself out and reopens — no manual download needed. Turn it off under Settings → Display.

items.title: News panel + update check
items.text: The start page now shows news and tells you when a newer version is available — no need to open GitHub. Turn it off under Settings → Display.

items.title: Custom classes & YOLO export
items.text: Define your own detection classes (Settings → Classes), import them from a classes.txt / data.yaml, and export classes.txt + data.yaml with an optional train/val split — train any object detector, not just manga bubbles.

items.title: Krita-style start page & drag-and-drop
items.text: Recent-images grid, dockable Tools / Boxes / Pages panels, and drag images, a folder or a project onto the window to load them.
